title: World of Alice   Uppercase and Lowercase
description: World of Alice - Uppercase and Lowercase World of Alice - Uppercase and Lowercase is an educational game developed for children where they will learn uppercase and lowercase letters in a fun and interactive way using their cell phone, tablet or computer. Excellent educational resource. In World of Alice, learning is fun.
instructions: Click on the letter in its uppercase form
